purpose: Classify the current web-search leads after the architecture result-bundle work.

routes.label: MDS-UPDRS Part III total plus tremor subitems in the ProPark cohort
routes.modality: single wrist Newcastle AX6 acceleration and gyroscope at 100 Hz over seven home-monitoring days
routes.name: ProPark home tremor wrist-worn AX6 / Hepp 2025
rationale: The dataset is available only from the ProPark consortium on reasonable request, so no local probe, scaffold, download, or model run is allowed now.
The published analysis is tremor-focused: MDS-UPDRS III items 15-18 and wearable tremor amplitude/duration/volume, not WearGait-style gait/balance regression.

Although the cohort includes total MDS-UPDRS III and is larger than several tested external rows, it is lower priority than the existing six access packets because schema, redistributability, raw-file structure, and usable total-score linkage are uninspected.
If access is ever approved, it should enter through the existing read-only schema-probe gate and remain external-validity only until a separate preregistered augmentation screen clears.

routes.label: UPDRS-III baseline metadata and nFoGQ in the public DeFoG dataset
routes.modality: lower-back Axivity acceleration during home-like FoG provocation tasks
routes.name: DeFoG phase-specific FoG biomechanics / Gait & Posture 2026
rationale: The paper explicitly analyzes the public DeFoG dataset, already represented by the TLVMC/DeFOG route.
Iter51 already ran the WearGait-to-DeFoG zero-shot route and closed it as partial external-validity evidence only.
This secondary event-level FoG analysis is useful related work for phase-specific features, but it does not reopen an internal T1/T3 ceiling-break route.

routes.label: UPDRS-III OFF/ON total and item CSVs
routes.modality: bilateral wrist GENEActiv accelerometry at 100 Hz over free-living days
routes.name: COPS Scientific Data 2026
rationale: The current web search resurfaced COPS, but iter49 already completed the public download, feature extraction, and zero-shot battery.
The result remains external-validity only: wrist-only transfer was null and clinical+wrist transfer was partial.

already_recorded_routes: DeFoG phase-specific FoG biomechanics / Gait & Posture 2026
master_routes_changed: ProPark home tremor wrist-worn AX6 / Hepp 2025
